parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.first().json; const message = input.message || 'Hello'; const phone = input.phone || ''; const orderId = input.orderId || ''; const intents = {'order_status': /order|status|where|track|shipping/i, 'refund': /refund|return|money back/i, 'cancel': /cancel|stop/i, 'complaint': /bad|terrible|worst|angry|scam/i, 'confirm': /confirm|yes|ok/i}; let intent = 'general'; let isAngry = false; for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(intents)) { if (v.test(message)) { intent = k; break; } } const angryWords = ['bad', 'terrible', 'worst', 'angry', 'scam', 'hate', 'rubbish']; isAngry = angryWords.some(w => message.toLowerCase().includes(w)); const needsEscalation = intent === 'refund' || intent === 'cancel' || isAngry; return [{json: {message, phone, orderId, detectedIntent: intent, isAngry, needsEscalation, language: /[\u0600-\u06FF]/.test(message) ? 'ar' : 'en'}}];

parts.text: You are Egyptian e-commerce customer support AI. Respond in Egyptian Arabic dialect naturally. Customer message: {{ $json.message }}. Intent: {{ $json.detectedIntent }}. Is angry: {{ $json.isAngry }}. Keep under 3 sentences.

messages.content: You are an AI assistant for Egyptian e-commerce.

parameters.jsCode: const gemini = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.candidates)?.json; const groq = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.choices)?.json; const ctx = $('Process').first().json; let response = ''; let provider = 'mock'; if (gemini?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text) { response = gemini.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text; provider = 'gemini'; } else if (groq?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content) { response = groq.choices[0].message.content; provider = 'groq'; } else { const r = {'order_status': 'Your order is being shipped, delivery in 2-3 days.', 'refund': 'We will process your refund within 5-7 business days.', 'cancel': 'Your order has been cancelled successfully.', 'complaint': 'We sincerely apologize. We will resolve this immediately.', 'confirm': 'Confirmed! Your order will arrive soon. Thank you!', 'general': 'Hello! How can we help you today?'}; response = r[ctx.detectedIntent] || r.general; provider = 'mock'; } return [{json: {success: true, response, intent: ctx.detectedIntent, isAngry: ctx.isAngry, provider, escalation: ctx.needsEscalation}}];
